digest.greeting: Jean, today moved several planning threads into clearer next steps: Skills and Amazon Connect, the 2:30 PM coverage decision, Incident Response, and Court EAD routing all advanced. A few portfolio and readiness follow-ups are still worth carrying into tomorrow, especially LevelPath, CoE newsletter ownership, and the File Release check-in.

items.label: Finished the remaining Incident Response work with Bill
items.detail: The carry-forward item to close the remaining Incident Response work with Bill was completed today.

items.label: Turned Skills and Amazon Connect planning into a roadmap path
items.detail: The Skills and Amazon Connect planning item was completed after the training session focused on training approach, timeline, communications, change management, and leadership-ready recommendations.

items.label: Resolved the 2:30 PM meeting coverage overlap
items.detail: The afternoon coverage decision was completed for the overlap between EPMO TL, the J&J sync, and Legal Change Management.

items.label: Routed Court EAD Final Updates into the CM-CoE intake path
items.detail: Jean sent the request-received note to Jessica Richburg, with Mar Garcia and David Molano copied, confirming the Court EAD Final Updates request was added to the CM-CoE active evaluation queue.

items.label: Track LevelPath UAT and SSO readiness before go-live
items.detail: LevelPath remains the highest-risk carry-forward item: UAT has moved forward, go-live is still targeted for July 24, and production SSO still needs confirmation before the path is fully clear.

items.label: Confirm the CoE newsletter owner and status
items.detail: The CoE newsletter follow-up remains unresolved. Confirm who owns the next send and whether anything is needed before the weekly recap cadence continues.

items.label: Follow up with Katie about the missing File Release project
items.detail: The File Release project follow-up remains open. Clarify why the project is not showing and what Katie needs next.

items.label: Lock next steps from the Jhara and Mental Health meetings
items.detail: Carry forward any owners, milestones, or blockers that still need to be captured from Jhara's portfolio roadblocks discussion and the Mental Health project meeting.

items.label: Prepare the CSC Portfolio follow-up path
items.detail: Keep the CSC portfolio scope, expected decisions, and first follow-up owner moving after the initial review with Hassan.

items.label: USCIS Expedite Request backend changes can move forward separately
items.detail: Frank Von Hassell shared that the business stakeholders, David and Yuri, and solution architects approved moving the backend enhancements forward independently from the original held project.

items.label: Legal Change Management - IT & EPMO Sync
items.detail: Use this to carry forward any clarification still open from today's EPMO and IT SharePoint alignment thread.

items.label: 1:1 Thiago & Jean
items.detail: Good follow-up window for Amazon Connect after today's training and communications planning session.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean, followed by a midday capture window
items.detail: The Maria 1:1 is followed by a canceled Jean/Sara 1:1 and a 12:00 PM blocked space, creating room to capture morning follow-ups.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting: Attorney Client Privilege training
items.detail: Chelsea Schinnour is listed as the special guest for attorney-client privilege training, with updates and reminders also on the agenda.

items.label: CoE Biweekly Touchpoint overlaps focus time
items.detail: CoE Biweekly Touchpoint and preparation focus time both run at 4:00 PM, followed by Jean/Sara 1:1 at 4:30 PM.

items.label: Jhara is scheduled to be out after tomorrow
items.detail: Calendar shows Jhara out of office starting Thursday, July 23, so tomorrow is the cleanest window to close any Jhara-owned follow-ups.
